title: Afk Plus
description: A lightweight datapack that lets players toggle AFK mode, protecting them from damage while displaying their AFK status and tracking time away.
body:
A lightweight datapack that lets players toggle AFK mode, protecting them from damage while displaying their AFK status and tracking time away.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/qhUS2DuCA9Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Command
- `/trigger afk` or `/trigger afk.enable`: Activates AFK mode
- `/trigger afk.display` or `Shift`: Exits AFK mode
- `/trigger afk.mute`: Mutes AFK announcement messages
- `/trigger afk.unmute`: Unmutes AFK announcement messages

### Features
- Toggle AFK mode using a simple command.
- Easy to toggle afk mode by shift key.
- Adds an “(AFK)” suffix to player names.
- Show on tablist afk.
- Prevents damage while AFK.
- Tracks total AFK time.
- Notifies other players when someone goes AFK or returns.
- Automatic status handling for better multiplayer experience.

If you notice any error or any problem related to version, feel free to DM [Planet Minecraft ↗](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/bibekthelegend/) or [Join Discord ↗](https://discord.com/invite/VHHGQSg7gU)!
